tasks.instruction: Przeczytaj ponizszy tekst. Uzupelnij kazda luke (1.1-1.10) jednym wyrazem, tak aby otrzymac spojny, logiczny i poprawny jezykowo tekst. Wymagana jest calkowita poprawnosc ortograficzna wpisywanych wyrazow.
tasks.title: UNDERSTANDING EARTHQUAKES
tasks.text:
An earthquake happens when large pieces of the Earth's surface suddenly move. 1.1. _________ pieces are called tectonic plates, and they are constantly shifting, 1.2. _________ usually so slowly that we cannot feel it. When two plates push 1.3. _________ each other or pull apart, the energy that is released causes the ground to shake.

Most earthquakes occur along plate boundaries. Japan, 1.4. _________ example, experiences thousands of earthquakes every year 1.5. _________ it sits on the boundary of several plates. 1.6. _________ all earthquakes are dangerous, though. Many of 1.7. _________ are so small that people do not even notice them.

Scientists who study earthquakes are 1.8. _________ seismologists. They use special instruments to measure 1.9. _________ strong an earthquake is. Although we still cannot predict exactly when an earthquake will happen, we have learned a great deal 1.10. _________ what causes them.
